codeReview.summary: Pass. The change only adds regression coverage, and the new tests match the existing implementation. `tests/services/test_watch_api_baseline.py:43-57` verifies malformed and invalid bearer sessions against the fail-closed auth path in `app/routers/auth_db.py:69-91`. `tests/services/test_watch_digest_service.py:378-399` and `455-533` verify the Mini-safe digest-card baseline, placeholder waiting-state behavior, and exact user-scoped membership projection implemented in `app/services/watch_digest_service.py:93-146`, `298-308`, and `386-399`. I found no high-confidence correctness issues in the reviewed feature.

summary: Reviewed the worker transcript skeleton, handoff, skill, and commit `e1aa5d344ecd2c91890439600f16524b3cd0b7e1`. The added regressions are aligned with the current auth and digest service behavior, and I did not find actionable correctness defects or shared-state gaps for this feature.
